# Test Workflow

## Goal
This is a test workflow for automated testing of Claude command generation.

## Prerequisites
- Test environment setup
- Claude integration installed

## Steps
1. Initialize test environment
2. Run test workflow
3. Validate results

## Validation
- [ ] Test environment ready
- [ ] Workflow executed successfully
- [ ] Results match expectations

## Error Handling
If tests fail:
1. Check error logs
2. Verify test setup
3. Debug specific failures

## Output
- Test results report
- Coverage metrics
- Performance data
